attributes.title: [PostgreSQL OTel] Active Queries
attributes.description: Real-time snapshots of active queries from pg_stat_activity. Shows wait events, execution time, and state.

"id": "", "title": "", "description": "", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "## [PostgreSQL OTel] Active Queries

Real-time snapshots of active queries from pg_stat_activity:
- Query text and execution time
- Backend state (active, idle, etc.)
- Wait events (Lock, IO, LWLock)
- Client IP and application name
"}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}}}, {"panelIndex": "16c499dd-c0bc-0170-aa42-57b43f9bc11c", "gridData": {"x": 16, "y": 2, "w": 32, "h": 4, "i": "16c499dd-c0bc-0170-aa42-57b43f9bc11c"}, "type": "lens", "embeddableConfig": {"enhancements": {"dynamicActions": {"events": []}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "attributes": {"title": "Active Query Count", "visualizationType": "lnsMetric", "type": "lens", "references": [], "state": {"visualization": {"layerId": "455df801-0b47-5e19-2d79-65783fe20051", "layerType": "data", "metricAccessor": "f85ad40f-e8de-3955-a37c-7209479c06df", "showBar": false, "applyColorTo": "background"}, "query": {"esql": "FROM logs-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
